name: logistics-tracker
description: 物流跟踪 Skill — 对接 17Track 批量 API，自动跟踪运单状态，向客户发送邮件通知，并在异常时告警

scripts.status: node -e "const s = require('./scripts/scheduler'); s.getSchedulerStatus().then(r => console.log(JSON.stringify(r, null, 2)));"
scripts.quota: node -e "const a = require('./scripts/tracking-api'); a.getQuotaStatus().then(r => console.log(JSON.stringify(r, null, 2)));"
scripts.test:config: node -e "const c = JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('./config/logistics-config.json','utf8')); console.log('✅ Config valid, carriers:', c.carriers.length);"

author: WILSON (Evolution System)
